M1615_INCNTNT_TIMING M1615 When Does Urinary Incontinence Occur This field indicates when urinary incontinence occurs. 00 = Timed-voiding defers incontinence
01 = Occasional stress incontinence
02 = During the night only
03 = During the day only
04 = During the day and night CHAR 2 x x x x
M1620_BWL_INCONT M1620 (M0540) Bowel Incontinence Frequency This field indicates the frequency of bowel
